summary: Completed testing of Navigation Cleanup Pack integration. All navigation links are visible and working correctly across all portals.

issues: Growth section items (Go-To-Market Config, Commission Engine, etc.) are not visible in the actual AdminLayout.js sidebar navigation. The adminNavigation.js config is only used for the Navigation Audit page display, not the actual sidebar. However, the pages are accessible via direct URL.

action_items: Consider adding Growth section items to AdminLayout.js navItems array if they should be visible in the admin sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: adminNavigation.js config is used only for Navigation Audit page display, not for actual sidebar rendering
AdminLayout.js uses its own navItems array for sidebar navigation which doesn't include Growth section items
All help pages and navigation audit page are properly routed and accessible
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation Cleanup Pack fully tested. All help pages (/help/customer, /help/admin, /help/affiliate, /help/sales, /help/vendor) render correctly. Navigation Audit page at /system/navigation-audit shows all navigation links. Partner sidebar shows Affiliate and Vendor sections. Customer sidebar shows Help link. Admin sidebar uses AdminLayout.js navItems (not adminNavigation.js config).

help_customer_page.details: Customer Help page renders with onboarding wizard and help bullets

help_admin_page.details: Admin Help page renders with onboarding wizard and help bullets

help_affiliate_page.details: Affiliate Help page renders with onboarding wizard and help bullets

help_sales_page.details: Sales Help page renders with onboarding wizard and help bullets

help_vendor_page.details: Vendor Help page renders with onboarding wizard and help bullets

navigation_audit_page.details: Navigation Audit page shows all 5 sections: Public Navbar, Customer Sidebar, Staff Sidebar, Partner Sidebar, Admin Sidebar

partner_sidebar_affiliate_section.details: Partner sidebar shows Affiliate section with: Affiliate Dashboard, Promotions, Sales, Earnings, Payouts, Performance, Profile, Help

partner_sidebar_vendor_section.details: Partner sidebar shows Vendor section with: Vendor Dashboard

customer_sidebar_help_link.details: Customer sidebar shows Help link that navigates to /help/customer

admin_sidebar_growth_section.details: Growth section items are defined in adminNavigation.js but not in AdminLayout.js navItems. Pages are accessible via direct URL (/admin/go-to-market, /admin/commission-engine, etc.)
